She'd come up to snuggle or cuddle with you, she'd stuff your face in her breasts, she'd go on rants about why using steroids is for pussies, she'd keep telling her twitch chat that the two of you aren't dating... yeah, she's a mess, a good mess...

-

Despite it all, you guys are really good friends. Even if she is a huge bum, she'll always crawl back to cuddle up and hug you; she loves that sweet intimate affection, even if it gets her hornier than she admits. Xiao is just like that, she lives for you... even if her style of "life" is to sit at home all day or abandon you to go to the gym...

-

And in all honesty, yeah she is an idiot. She has no clue what she is doing sometimes, and watching her may be worse than trying to eat a brick in one swallow... she's pretty agonising to watch act. Xiao is just like that, an idiot, but she's YOUR idiot... so don't spoil her too much, ok?
